description_long: This object is a rectangular, boxy briefcase with a minimalist, industrial design, featuring a flat lid and four circular elements on the front that resemble latches or decorative studs. The case is primarily gray with a matte finish, and it has a robust, angular structure. The interior is visible from the side, revealing two black seats and a mounted green cylindrical object with a pointed tip, possibly a tool or prop. The briefcase sits on four black wheels, giving it a mobile, cart-like appearance. The steering wheel and dashboard are visible from the side, suggesting some interactive or functional elements. There are no visible handles, locks, or external pockets, and the corners are sharp without any reinforcements.
description: A gray, boxy briefcase with wheels, two seats, and a mounted green cylindrical object inside, featuring a minimalist industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat lid, four circular elements, and the wheels beneath the case.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the open interior with two seats, a steering wheel, and a mounted green cylindrical object.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the seats and the green cylindrical object, with the open box structure visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seats, steering wheel, and mounted object from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: none visible; no handles are present on the exterior.
